title: AI Trading Agents Deliver Stellar Performance: 162% Annualized Return, 90.51% Profitable Trades, and High Profit Factor
author: tickeron_community
selftext: **Los Angeles, CA – September 8, 2025** – [Tickeron](https://tickeron.com/), a leading innovator in AI-driven financial technology, today announced the exceptional performance of its [AI Trading Agents](https://tickeron.com/bot-stock-trading/), achieving annualized returns of up to 162%, profitable trade percentages as high as 90.51%, and a robust profit factor across multiple assets. Powered by advanced Financial Learning Models (FLMs), these agents provide real-time trading signals with tick-level brokerage data, enabling both novice and expert traders to capitalize on market opportunities with unprecedented precision.
